# Numeric Less Than

Numeric less than comparison

```perl
$less = $a < $b;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$less = $a < $b;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$less = $a < $b;
```

### Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```
